mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, address_snapshot, original_amount, total_amount, coin_used, coin_discount, coupon_id, coupon_discount, status, payment_method, remark, estimated_delivery_days, auto_ship_at, paid_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{addressSnapshot}, #{originalAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{coinUsed}, #{coinDiscount}, #{couponId}, #{couponDiscount}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{remark}, #{estimatedDeliveryDays}, #{autoShipAt}, #{paidAt})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username AS username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT o.*, u.username AS username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT o.*, u.username AS username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')

SELECT o.*, u.username AS username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'PAID' AND o.shipped_at IS NULL AND o.auto_ship_at IS NOT NULL AND o.auto_ship_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY o.auto_ship_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, paid_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PAID' THEN COALESCE(paid_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE paid_at END, shipped_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SHIPPED' THEN COALESCE(shipped_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE shipped_at END, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE completed_at END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE completed_at END WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
